items.title: Tata Electronics confirms cyberattack as hackers leak data
items.summary: Tata Electronics has confirmed in a statement to BleepingComputer that it was the target of a cyberattack that impacted parts of its IT infrastructure. [...]

items.title: Scope of Salesforce Attacks Expands as Icarus Leaks Data
items.summary: More victims have emerged after attackers breached application vendor Klue and used its OAuth tokens to steal customers' Salesforce data.

items.title: Windows 11 KB5095093 update rolls out new Point-in-Time restore feature
items.summary: ​​Microsoft has released the KB5095093 preview cumulative update for Windows 11 24H2 and 25H2, which fixes numerous bugs and begins rolling out new features, including the new Point-in-Time restore feature. [...]

items.title: Healthtech firm Xolis suffers data breach impacting 1.4 million people
items.summary: Healthcare technology company Xsolis says that sensitive data belonging to nearly 1.4 million individuals was compromised in a phishing attack that gave attackers access to its network. [...]

items.title: Dialog Claims It Was Hacked. A Misconfigured Website Left Its Members Exposed
items.summary: The private events group, cofounded by Peter Thiel, says a “criminal” hacker is behind a breach that exposed members’ personal details. WIRED found no evidence a break-in was needed to access the files.

items.title: 'Cordyceps': Mushrooming Malicious Pull Requests Threaten Developer Workflows
items.summary: The CI/CD workflow weakness affects Microsoft's Azure Sentinel, Google's AI Agent Development Kit, Apache's Doris analytics database, Cloudflare's Workers SDK, and Python Software Foundation's Black.

items.title: Five Eyes agencies sound alarm about AI’s threat to cybersecurity
items.summary: "The timeline is not years, it is months,” the nations of the Five Eyes intelligence alliance said in a joint alert about the cybersecurity concerns of artificial intelligence.

items.title: New macOS ClickFix attack silently mounts DMGs to push infostealer
items.summary: A new macOS ClickFix campaign is using Terminal commands to silently download, mount, and launch info-stealing malware from malicious disk image (DMG) files. [...]

items.title: FortiBleed Targeted FortiGate Firewalls in 110 Million-Credential Harvesting Operation
items.summary:
A Russian-speaking initial access broker (IAB) driven by financial gain is assessed to be behind a large-scale credential-harvesting operation known as FortiBleed that has targeted over 430,000 FortiGate firewalls globally.

The campaign, active since February 2026, involves collecting credential li

items.title: Feds seize alleged cyber-scam infrastructure connected to Southeast Asian company
items.summary: The Department of Justice announced the “seizure of a cloud computing account” used by subsidiaries of the Huione Group, a conglomerate severed from the U.S. financial system last year.

items.title: Dragos Unveils AI for OT Security
items.summary:
Named EmberAI, the new capability is built on Dragos’ massive operational technology cybersecurity dataset.
The post Dragos Unveils AI for OT Security  appeared first on SecurityWeek.

items.title: Trump directs federal agencies to protect US data from quantum threats
items.summary: An executive order signed Monday aims to accelerate the government's transition to post-quantum cryptography (PQC), a new generation of encryption designed to protect data from the powerful quantum computers expected in the future.

items.title: Scattered Spider Hackers Plead Guilty on Day 1 of Trial
items.summary: Two men pleaded guilty in the United Kingdom this week to criminal charges stemming from an August 2024 cyberattack that crippled Transport for London, the entity responsible for the public transport network in the Greater London area. The duo were key members of a prolific cybercrime group known as

items.title: Data Exposure Flaws Threaten Dify AI Platform Used by 1 Million Apps
items.summary:
Attackers could abuse Dify's multi-tenant cloud service to read private chats, preview other tenants' documents, and reach internal APIs.
The post Data Exposure Flaws Threaten Dify AI Platform Used by 1 Million Apps appeared first on SecurityWeek.

items.title: Scattered Spider members plead guilty to hacking Transport for London
items.summary: Two members of the 'Scattered Spider' cybercrime group pleaded guilty to hacking the Transport for London (TfL) systems in 2024. [...]

items.title: Compromise kids online safety bill unveiled by House leaders, with key omission
items.summary: The so-called duty of care provision that was excluded would have mandated that online platforms take reasonable measures to prevent specific harms such as suicidal ideation, eating disorders and cyberbullying by changing algorithm and design features.

items.title: Fake AI Agent Skill Passed Security Scans and Reportedly Reached 26,000 Agents
items.summary:
Security firm AIR built a fake AI agent skill, pushed it through a popular skill marketplace and an Instagram ad, and says it reached roughly 26,000 agents, including some on corporate accounts.

Every skill security scanner the firm tested it against marked it safe. The payload was harmle

items.title: Trump Order Sets 2030 Deadline for Federal Post-Quantum Crypto Migration
items.summary:
President Trump signed an executive order on June 22 setting hard deadlines for federal agencies to move high-value assets and high-impact systems to post-quantum cryptography.

Key establishment must move by December 31, 2030; digital signatures by December 31, 2031. EO 14409 leaves natio

items.title: GitHub Updates actions/checkout to Block Common Pwn Request Attack Patterns
items.summary:
GitHub is moving to strengthen software supply chain security by updating "actions/checkout" to block pwn request attacks that exploit the risky use of the "pull_request_target workflow" trigger to run malicious code with the workflow's full privileges.

items.title: OpenAI Expands Daybreak to Help Defenders Patch Flaws
items.summary: OpenAI expanded Daybreak with a full GPT-5.5-Cyber release to help defenders patch software flaws

items.title: The Exploit Doesn't Exist. You Can Still Prove It Works Against You

items.summary: LastPass announced that hackers accessed customer data from its Salesforce environment after stealing the company's OAuth tokens in the Klue supply chain attack earlier this month. [...]

items.title: SocGholish Takedown Highlights Malicious TDS Threats
items.summary: SocGholish uses traffic distribution systems (TDSs) to provide initial access into victims' networks for cybercrime groups such as the notorious Evil Corp.

items.title: Two Scattered Spider members plead guilty over cyberattack that crippled London transit
items.summary: A 20-year-old and an 18-year-old admitted to infiltrating the network of Transport for London in 2024, disrupting public transportation services for months.

items.title: Eight-Year-Old Samsung KNOX Flaw Exposed Millions of Galaxy Devices to Kernel Attacks
items.summary:
The high-severity use-after-free vulnerability in Samsung's KNOX security framework affected Android-powered Galaxy devices from the S9 through S25.
The post Eight-Year-Old Samsung KNOX Flaw Exposed Millions of Galaxy Devices to Kernel Attacks appeared first on SecurityWeek.

items.title: GTA 6 Scams Emerge as Pre-Orders Open
items.summary: Cybercriminals launch fake GTA 6 pre-order sites offering early access for crypto payments

items.title: CISO Conversations: Carl Froggett – Combining CISO and CIO at Deep Instinct
items.summary:
Carl Froggett combines CISO and CIO. He currently occupies both positions at Deep Instinct. Before then, he was CISO at Citi for almost 17 years.

items.title: FortiBleed Attackers Turn Firewalls Into Credential Stealers as Heists Persist
items.summary: The threat actors engineered a Golang-based sniffer to target 430,000 FortiGate firewalls and identify 110 million credentials in the ongoing global campaign.

items.title: Algerian Man Extradited to US for Running Cybercrime Marketplaces
items.summary:
26-year-old Abdellah Belmili faces up to 30 years in prison for allegedly operating the marketplaces Market0Day and Spoxy.
